payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Underside view of a ceiling-mounted fan with four medium-brown wooden blades and a central frosted glass dome light; metal/brass hardware visible around the light; the fan is partially edge-cropped in the image. Appears mounted at typical ceiling height, roughly 3.0 meters from the camera.
